tasks.title: Add JSON storage foundation
tasks.instructions: Implement the task file's Scope and Acceptance Criteria.
tasks.schedulingRationale: This root task establishes the shared `Bookmark` model and `BookmarkStorage` public contracts used by every later task; its future overlap is therefore uncertain until those contracts exist.

tasks.title: Persist bookmarks and filter by tags
tasks.instructions: Implement the task file's Scope and Acceptance Criteria.
tasks.schedulingRationale: It depends on task 001 because both use the shared `Bookmark` and `BookmarkStorage` contracts, and task 002 modifies the shared `src/bookmarks/service.py` module.

tasks.title: Add the bookmarks module CLI
tasks.instructions: Implement the task file's Scope and Acceptance Criteria.
tasks.schedulingRationale: It depends on task 002 because it consumes the shared `BookmarkService` constructor and `list_all(tags=...)` contract; the end-to-end CLI tests also use the shared storage behavior.

tasks.title: Document bookmark CLI usage
tasks.instructions: Implement the task file's Scope and Acceptance Criteria.
tasks.schedulingRationale: It depends on task 003 because documentation verifies the shared public `python -m bookmarks` command contract and its CLI output/examples before publishing them.
